product_name: Red Floral Animal Mix Midi Dress | Size: 8
description: Bold yet graceful, this Floral Mix Midi Dress is made to stand out. With a striking mix of moody florals and subtle animal-textured contrast , it’s the perfect piece to take you from cocktail hour to a chic dinner date.. Crafted from luxe satin with a smooth, fluid drape, the dress features two fabric finishes: a deep black floral satin with bold red blossoms, and a subtly textured black satin at the yoke and sleeves with a refined animal pattern. The combination gives a layered, high-fashion look while remaining wearable and soft against the skin.. Key Features:. V-Neck Bodice – Flatters the neckline and elongates the torso. Contrast fabrics – Features a tone-on-tone leopard texture that adds visual intrigue without overpowering the floral print.. Flutter Sleeves – Soft, flowing sleeves add movement and a romantic finish.. Bias-Cut Skirt – Skims the body beautifully. Pair with black strappy heels or pointed mules for a sleek finish. Dress Length: 125cm. Model is 5'8 and wears a size 8
